2605.22749.title: Cyber-Physical Anomaly Detection in IoT-Enabled Smart Grids Using Machine Learning and Metaheuristic Feature Optimization
2605.22749.paper_summary: Modern smart grids rely on dense measurement infrastructures, communication links, and intelligent field devices. Although this improves supervision and control, it also increases vulnerability to cyber-physical disruptions. Operators must distinguish physical incidents, such as faults or line disturbances, from malicious actions, such as false data injection or unauthorized command execution. This chapter investigates this problem using the well-known MSU/ORNL Power System Attack Dataset. The proposed method combines machine learning with genetic-algorithm-based feature selection. The objective is twofold: to classify attack and natural events accurately, and to determine whether a reduced set of physically informative PMU/IED measurements can support reliable detection. Several baseline models are evaluated, including logistic regression, RBF-SVM, XGBoost, Random Forest, and Extra Trees. The results show that tree-based ensemble models are the most effective for the considered dataset, with Extra Trees providing the strongest full-feature baseline. After feature selection, the GA + Extra Trees model reduces the clean PMU feature space from 112 attributes to an average of 27.4 attributes over five runs, while increasing macro-F1 from 0.9118 to 0.9212 and ROC-AUC from 0.9791 to 0.9837. These results indicate that many synchronized electrical measurements are redundant. A compact subset of phasor-based features can still provide accurate and interpretable anomaly detection in smart grids.
2605.22749.paper_summary_zh: 現代智能電網依賴於密集的測量基礎設施、通信連接和智能現場設備。<lb/>雖然這改善了監控和控制，但也增加了對網絡物理中斷的脆弱性。<lb/>操作員必須區分物理事件，如故障或線路擾動，與惡意行為，如虛假數據注入或未經授權的命令執行。<lb/>本章利用著名的 MSU/ORNL 電力系統攻擊數據集研究這個問題。<lb/>所提出的方法結合了機器學習和基於遺傳算法的特徵選擇。<lb/>其目標有兩個：準確分類攻擊和自然事件，以及確定是否可以用一組減少的物理信息 PMU/IED 測量來支持可靠檢測。<lb/>評估了幾個基準模型，包括邏輯回歸、RBF-SVM、XGBoost、隨機森林和額外樹。<lb/>結果顯示，基於樹的集成模型對於考慮的數據集最為有效，其中額外樹提供了最強的全特徵基準。<lb/>經過特徵選擇後，GA + 額外樹模型將乾淨的 PMU 特徵空間從 112 個屬性減少到五次運行的平均 27.4 個屬性，同時將宏觀 F1 從 0.9118 提高到 0.9212，ROC-AUC 從 0.9791 提高到 0.9837。<lb/>這些結果表明，許多同步電氣測量是冗餘的。<lb/>一個緊湊的基於相量的特徵子集仍然可以在智能電網中提供準確且可解釋的異常檢測。
2605.22749.author: Adis Alihodžić et.al.
2605.22749.authors: Adis Alihodžić, Eva Tuba, Milan Tuba
